title: M001-E001-S001: Data generation script with identity overlap
description: Generate 7 source datasets with deterministic seed, realistic distributions, controlled email overlap (~60% ghost-mailerlite, ~30% walker, ~10% shortio). Paths: src/data-sources/content-creator/data/content-creator/

title: M001-E002-S001: Postgres and MongoDB init scripts
description: postgres_init.sh loads ghost_member + ghost_post into Postgres. mongo_init.py loads mailerlite_subscriber into MongoDB. Copy github patterns. Paths: src/data-sources/content-creator/

title: M001-E003-S003: Ground truth placement and verification
description: Place 3 ground truth CSVs at src/data-sources/content-creator/gt/content-creator/ and verify with check.py. Depends on E001-S002 and E003-S001.

title: M001-E004-S001: End-to-end smoke test
description: Verify eval.sh content-creator runs through Docker setup, init scripts, workdir preparation without errors. Validate ground truth against itself. Depends on E002 and E003.

title: M001-E003-S001: scenario.yaml configuration
description: src/scenarios/content-creator/scenario.yaml with credentials for all sources, judges (correctness + code_quality + kg_compliance), and 3 expected model definitions. Copy github structure.

title: M001-E001-S002: Ground truth CSV generation
description: Generate 3 ground truth CSVs from source data: creator__accounts (FULL OUTER JOIN on email), creator__content_performance (UNION across platforms), creator__monthly_metrics (GROUP BY month). Depends on S001.

title: M001-E003-S002: SPEC.md task specification
description: src/scenarios/content-creator/SPEC.md with objective, all 7 sources with connection details, 3 output model definitions with exact columns, BI tool requirement, deliverable format. Follow github SPEC.md structure.

title: M001-E002-S002: S3 and REST API init scripts
description: s3_init.sh uploads shortio_clicks.jsonl + walker_events.jsonl to LocalStack S3. api_server.py serves youtube_videos as REST endpoint. Copy github patterns. Paths: src/data-sources/content-creator/
